channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 75 anniversario 2021 — $717.24
item.description:
$717.24 · Excellent · Lorenzo Bartoli

Contattare telefonicamente: 342 02 777 37

ULTIMO PREZZO NON TRATTABILE

Strumento immacolato. Tutte le specifiche tecniche sono facilmente trovabili su internet.

Compreso nel prezzo stand per poggiare lo strumento, custodia molto ben imbottita della Sire, cinghia con blocca cinghia di gomma, accordatore Ibanez e il Vox Amplug 3.

item.title: Fender Custom Shop Jazz Bass LIMITED EDITION 2024 - natural — $4,542.53
item.description:
$4,542.53 · Excellent · Juande's Gear

For sale this amazing Fender Custom Shop Jazz Bass LIMITED EDITION with Heavy Relic natural finish, manufactured in 2024. In LIKE NEW condition. Highly customized features include:


- Heavy Relic finish

- Hand-selected, two-piece lightweight alder body

- Rosewood fretboard also hand-selected for darkness

- Custom Shop Hand-wound pickups

- Custom metal potentiometers

- Lollipop reverse vintage tuners


Includes its original hard case with protective covers and tags, all accessories, labels, certificate of authenticity, floor traveler, picks, Custom Shop strap, etc... EVERYTHING, as if you just bought it from the store. Also lightweight at about 4.1 kg. The feel and sound of this bass are quite simply as good as Fender Jazz Basses get, the handwound pickups take the Custom Shop basses to a whole other dimension, and the relic job is tasteful and realistic. A Jazz bass to keep.

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP ILD10 Tracolla I Love Dust "out Of Control" — $51.16
item.description:
$51.16 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

Prodotte in jacquard confortevole di alta qualità, queste tracolle sono state progettate in collaborazione con gli artisti di ILOVEDUST, un pluripremiato studio di design con sede nel Regno Unito famosissimo per i suoi lavori stimolanti e innovativi. Ogni tracolla Jacquard è testata per una resistenza di 200 libbre (90 kg circa) con estremità in vera pelle progettate per l'uso con o senza il sistema di bloccaggio Straplok®. Prodotta in Nord America.

- Con disegni di artisti innovativi del pluripremiato studio di design inglese ILOVEDUST
- Realizzate in tessuto jacquard di alta qualità
- Testate per 200 libbre (90 kg circa)
- Estremità in vera pelle progettate per l'uso con o senza il sistema di fissaggio Straplok
- Prodotte in Nord America

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP D6710 Tracolla Jacquard Hexagon Echo Olive — $51.16
item.description:
$51.16 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

RACOLLE
Le Tracolle Jacquard sono realizzate in tessuto Jacquard confortevole e di alta qualità e presentano motivi vivaci e colorati progettati dai nostri artisti interni. Ogni Strap è testato per 200 libbre e ha estremità in vera pelle pensata per l'uso con o senza il sistema di fissaggio Straplok. Sei nuovi design sono aggiunti a questa serie di tracolle.

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP MH01 Tracolla Motörhead Spades — $31.98
item.description:
$31.98 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

TRACOLLE La MH02 Motörhead Logo è la tracolla di casa Dunlop che rende omaggio all'indelebile e infernale eredità dei Motörhead. Realizzata in tessuto jacquard di alta qualità con estremità in pelle.
PANORAMICA DELLA TRACOLLA DUNLOP MH02 MOTÖRHEAD LOGO
I Motörhead hanno unito la velocità del punk al volume del metal prima che chiunque altro pensasse a un simile connubio. La loro incrollabile dedizione alla musica, ai fan e alla vita in tour è un vero inno all'anima del rock 'n' roll: mai arrendersi, mai svendersi. Con questa tracolla Dunlop rende omaggio all'indelebile e infernale eredità dei Motoröhead. Realizzate in Nord America con tessuto jacquard confortevole e di alta qualità, le tracolle Dunlop Jacquard presentano eleganti motivi creati dagli artisti Dunlop interni. Offrono comfort sulla spalla, sia che si stia suonando da seduti che dopo una serata sul palco. Proteggono anche lo strumento: le tracolle Jacquard sono testate fino a 200 libbre e sono dotate di terminali in vera pelle, progettati per essere utilizzati da soli o il sistema Straplok. Colorazione Black.

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP MH02 Tracolla Motörhead Logo — $31.98
item.description:
$31.98 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

TRACOLLE
La MH02 Motörhead Logo è la tracolla di casa Dunlop che rende omaggio all'indelebile e infernale eredità dei Motörhead. Realizzata in tessuto jacquard di alta qualità con estremità in pelle.

Realizzate in Nord America con tessuto jacquard confortevole e di alta qualità, le tracolle Dunlop Jacquard presentano eleganti motivi creati dagli artisti Dunlop interni. Offrono comfort sulla spalla, sia che si stia suonando da seduti che dopo una serata sul palco. Proteggono anche lo strumento: le tracolle Jacquard sono testate fino a 200 libbre e sono dotate di terminali in vera pelle, progettati per essere utilizzati da soli o il sistema Straplok. Colorazione Black.

item.description:
$29.42 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

La D6733 Jacquard Black è la tracolla di casa Dunlop realizzata in tessuto jacquard di alta qualità, in grado di offrire comfort sulla spalla in ogni situazione. Colorazione Black.
PANORAMICA DELLA TRACOLLA DUNLOP D6733 JACQUARD BLACK

Realizzate in Nord America con tessuto jacquard confortevole e di alta qualità, le tracolle Dunlop Jacquard presentano eleganti motivi creati dagli artisti Dunlop interni. Offrono comfort sulla spalla, sia che si stia suonando da seduti che dopo una serata sul palco. Proteggono anche lo strumento: le tracolle Jacquard sono testate fino a 200 libbre e sono dotate di terminali in vera pelle, progettati per essere utilizzati da soli o il sistema Straplok. Colorazione Black.

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP JH07 Jimi Hendrix Fillmore — $57.56
item.description:
$57.56 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

DUNLOP JH07 Jim Hendrix Fillmore



Alla fine degli anni '60, Jimi Hendrix era nel centro musicale di una rivoluzione culturale. Dopo un nuovo decennio a Fillmore East, il 1° gennaio 1970, decise di tornare al blues. La performance di Jimi era insolitamente tranquilla, la sua testa china in profonda concentrazione, mentre la sua chitarra ululava e ruggiva con profondità viscerali ai ritmi del bassista Billy Cox e del batterista Buddy Miles. La sua versione magistrale di "Machine Gun" fu catturata quella notte affinchè le generazioni future sperimentassero il potere della musica come messaggio.
Caratteristiche

  • Tracolla realizzata con materiali, cuciture, fibbie di alta qualità

  • Larghezza: 5cm

  • Lunghezza: 84cm - 152cm

  • Tessitura: Jacquard vivace con motivi ispirati a Jimi

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP JH09 Jimi Hendrix Shreveport — $57.56
item.description:
$57.56 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

DUNLOP JH09 Jim Hendrix Shreveport
La JH09 Jimi Hendrix Shreveport Strap è la tracolla di casa Dunlop che incorpora lo spirito visionario dello storico chitarrista attraverso le opere espressivo dei migliori artisti del rock 'n' roll.
PANORAMICA

Nel 1968 gli Stati Uniti erano nel bel mezzo di un cambiamento culturale. Al centro di questo cambiamento in ambito musicale c'era Jimi Hendrix, un chitarrista come il mondo non aveva mai visto prima. Il 31 luglio 1968 suonò nel Municipal Auditorium di Shreveport, in Lousiana. L'allestimento del palco era scarno. Non c'era bisogno di luci o attrezzature audio elaborate. C'era solo un uomo con la sua chitarra, gli amplificatori e la musica che ha definito una rivoluzione culturale.

 

Lunghezza minima: 35" (88,9 cm)
Lunghezza massima: 63" (160 cm)

item.title: TRACOLLA PER CHITARRA E BASSO DUNLOP JH08 Jimi Hendrix Ttg Studios — $57.56
item.description:
$57.56 · Brand New · Firefly Audio

DUNLOP JH08 Jim Hendrix Ttg Studios


Alla fine degli anni '60, Jimi Hendrix era nel centro musicale di una rivoluzione culturale. Dopo un nuovo decennio a Fillmore East, il 1° gennaio 1970, decise di tornare al blues. La performance di Jimi era insolitamente tranquilla, la sua testa china in profonda concentrazione, mentre la sua chitarra ululava e ruggiva con profondità viscerali ai ritmi del bassista Billy Cox e del batterista Buddy Miles. La sua versione magistrale di "Machine Gun" fu catturata quella notte affinchè le generazioni future sperimentassero il potere della musica come messaggio.
Caratteristiche

  • Tracolla realizzata con materiali, cuciture, fibbie di alta qualità

  • Larghezza: 5cm

  • Lunghezza: 84cm - 152cm

  • Tessitura: Jacquard vivace con motivi ispirati a Jimi

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass, Ebony Fingerboard, Texas Tea (F10)(05413) (05413) — $1,939
item.description:
$1,939 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 9lbs 12oz

Up for sale is a Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass. This one came to us in great shape! The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with a case.

Built for players boldly seeking the best, American Ultra II is our most advanced series of instruments. American Ultra II guitars and basses feature premium materials, precision craftsmanship and cutting-edge design for instruments that both advance the state-of-the-art and stand the test of time.

The Fender® American Ultra II Jazz Bass® features a select alder body with sculpted body contours. For effortless playability, the quartersawn maple neck features our Modern D profile and smooth Ultra Satin finish. Ebony or quartersawn maple 10”-14” compound radius fingerboards feature Ultra rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, Luminlay® side dots and Graph Tech® TUSQ® nuts. The tapered neck heel and sculpted body contours allow unparalleled access to the higher register, while the truss rod access at the headstock provides convenient and easy setup and adjustment.

Outfitted with a set of specially designed Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass pickups, this bass delivers a massive tonal range, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. The redesigned preamp features unprecedented control to unlock endless tonal possibilities. Key features include S-1™ switching for active/passive operation, passive tone control and 3-band active EQ with switchable midrange frequency. Additional road-ready features including an adjustable HiMass™ top-load or string-through-body bridge, Fender light-weight tuners with tapered shafts, knurled aluminum knobs and 1-ply anodized aluminum pickguard.

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass infuses iconic style with advanced appointments to take your playing to stratospheric new heights. For players who demand flawless tone, infinite versatility and limitless performance, American Ultra II delivers.

Features

  • Select Alder Body with Ultra Contours and Sculpted Neck Heel

  • Graphite Reinforced Quartersawn Maple Modern “D” Profile Neck with Posiflex™ Support Rods

  • 10"-14" Compound Radius Ebony or Quartersawn Maple Fingerboard with Ultra Rolled Edges and Luminlay Side Dots

  • Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass® Pickups

  • Ultra II Active Bass Preamp With S-1™ Switching

  • 4-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ Bridge (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) and Deluxe Fluted-Shaft Tuners


SKU:0199111790


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V, Ebony Fingerboard, Ultraburst (J2)(25270) (25270) — $2,019
item.description:
$2,019 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 10lbs 6oz

Up for sale is a Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V in Ultraburst. This one came to us in great shape! The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with a case.

Built for players boldly seeking the best, American Ultra II is our most advanced series of instruments. American Ultra II guitars and basses feature premium materials, precision craftsmanship and cutting-edge design for instruments that both advance the state-of-the-art and stand the test of time.

The Fender® American Ultra II Jazz Bass® V features a select alder body with sculpted body contours. For effortless playability, the quartersawn maple neck features our Modern D profile and smooth Ultra Satin finish. Ebony or quartersawn maple 10”-14” compound radius fingerboards feature Ultra rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, Luminlay® side dots and Graph Tech® TUSQ® nuts. The tapered neck heel and sculpted body contours allow unparalleled access to the higher register, while the truss rod access at the headstock provides convenient and easy setup and adjustment.

Outfitted with a set of specially designed Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass pickups, this bass delivers a massive tonal range, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. The redesigned preamp features unprecedented control to unlock endless tonal possibilities. Key features include S-1™ switching for active/passive operation, passive tone control and 3-band active EQ with switchable midrange frequency. Additional road-ready features including an adjustable HiMass™ top-load or string-through-body bridge, Fender light-weight tuners with tapered shafts, knurled aluminum knobs and 1-ply anodized aluminum pickguard.

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass V infuses iconic style with advanced appointments to take your playing to stratospheric new heights. For players who demand flawless tone, infinite versatility and limitless performance, American Ultra II delivers.

Features

  • Select Alder Body with Ultra Contours and Sculpted Neck Heel

  • Graphite Reinforced Quartersawn Maple Modern “D” Profile Neck with Posiflex™ Support Rods

  • 10"-14" Compound Radius Ebony or Quartersawn Maple Fingerboard with Ultra Rolled Edges and Luminlay Side Dots

  • Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass® Pickups

  • Ultra II Active Bass Preamp With S-1™ Switching

  • 5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ Bridge (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) and Deluxe Fluted-Shaft Tuners


SKU:0199121712


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass, Rosewood Fingerboard, Olympic White (E3)(53071) (53071) — $2,009
item.description:
$2,009 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight - 9lbs 4oz

Up for sale is a Fender American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass in Olympic White. This one came to us in great shape and plays fantastic. The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one had a very tiny start to a heel crack that was sealed on the treble side and in great shape now. It may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with a case and the COA.

history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

The late '50s to the early '60s was a watershed period in the development of the Precision Bass®, a time of transition that would see the introduction of many new appointments that would become synonymous with the P-Bass®. By 1960, the design of the P-bass had eclipsed the earlier cues culled from the Telecaster® - now the P-bass had a Strat®-style headstock shape, comfort-contours, pickguard mounted electronics and 4-saddle bridge. Adorned in 3-Color Sunburst and topped with a 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard, the 1960 Precision Bass represented a more refined, enduring aesthetic for the model.

Featuring a premium alder body, Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil P-Bass pickup and a substantial "C" shape hard rock maple neck mated with a 7.25" radius slab rosewood fingerboard, the American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass reproduces the quintessential tone and feel of the original.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.

Features

  • Alder Body

  • Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish

  • Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups

  • "C"-Shaped Neck Profile

  • Slab Rosewood Fingerboard

  • Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Tuners

SKU:0190160805


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Jaguar Bass, Laurel Fingerboard, 3-Color Sunburst (SR)(09177) (09177) — $369
item.description:
$369 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight 8lbs 13oz

Up for sale is a Fender Classic Vibe Jaguar Bass. This one came to us in great shape and the electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one does not come with a case or gig bag.

The Classic Vibe Jaguar Bass turns up the volume on retro style, combining the iconic body shape of the Jaguar with the massive tone of its Fender-Designed alnico pickups. Player-friendly features include a medium 32 scale length, a slim, comfortable C-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets as well as a vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1970s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.


Features

  • 100% designed by Fender

  • Inspired by 1970s-era Jaguar models

  • Fender-Designed alnico pickups

  • Vintage-tint gloss neck finish

  • 32" scale length

SKU:0374560500


Franklin Guitar Works - Who We Are
FGW is a division of MIRC, LLC (Musical Instrument Reclamation Company), located in La Vergne, TN.  MIRC is the world’s largest refurbisher of stringed instruments.  We partner with the leading manufacturers in the industry, helping them recondition their distressed instruments. All of our instruments have been inspected, set up, and refurbished by our certified technicians to ensure you are receiving a quality instrument.

Hours of Operation
Our online Business hours are Monday - Friday 7:30 am to 4:00 pm CST. Closed on weekends and holidays.

Shipping Policy
Free ground shipping within the continental USA. Items under $20 will have a $9.95 shipping charge. We do not offer international shipping.
We cannot ship to a PO Box. Orders require a physical mailing address to be processed.
All orders over $500 will be shipped with a direct Signature Requirement to ensure it is received. If the signature requirement is refused, the customer will assume responsibility for the package once it reaches the delivery address.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, 7:30am - 4:00pm CST. Shipments are prepared in the order that they are received. We make every effort to expedite orders as quickly as possible, but we cannot guarantee ship dates. Please allow up to 3 business days for tracking information. 

Thank you for trusting us with your business.

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller V5 5-String 2021 - Present - Vintage White — $525
item.description:
$525 · Excellent · BT Music Services

Up for sale is a Sire V5 Bass. Bone stock, passive bass. Great tone and playability. Still has plastic on pick guard. Only reason I'm selling is because I prefer a passive/active option. One slight nick on neck, everything else is spotless. No case. Make me an offer!

item.title: Fender Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Signature Mustang Bass 2018 - Present - Faded Daphne Blue — $1,382.90
item.description:
$1,382.90 · Excellent · Steve E

From Fender.com:-

Known as a true renaissance man of the modern music scene, Justin Meldal-Johnsen's bass credits include Beck, Nine Inch Nails and more. His production credits include Jimmy Eat World, Paramore and M83, among others. JMJ is a shining example of today's breed of multi-genre musician/producers, ever pushing boundaries and inspiring others. From studio to stage, Justin's treasured '66 Mustang Bass is his tool of choice. We teamed up with him to create a signature 4-string modeled after his vintage Daphne Blue instrument - the Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Mustang Bass. Powered by a custom-spec split-coil pickup, the JMJ Road Worn Mustang bass is perfect for laying down punchy basslines with plenty of Fender mojo. The 30" scale gives it a tight, focused tone while the modern 9.5"-radius fingerboard with rolled edges offers a familiar feel that will make any bassist feel right at home.Designed for comfort and speed, this bass also has stage-ready style. From the nicks and picks scratches on the body to the worn-in feel of the neck to the aged hardware, this bass shows the marks of an instrument that has earned its stripes out on the road. Check out the unique tone and amazing feel of the Justin Meldal-Johnsen Road Worn Mustang Bass.

Note this guitar has round wound strings fitted, not flat wound.

Features

  • Road Worn Daphne Blue lacquer finish
  • 30"-scale maple neck; 9.5"-radius rosewood fingerboard
  • Custom-spec split-coil Mustang pickup
  • Vintage-style hardware; aged pearl pickguard
  • Hipshot® "Lollipop" tuners
  • “Deluxe” (!) Fender gig bag included

    Check out the full spec at Fender.com.

item.title: Peavey T-40 with Maple Fretboard 1978 - 1988 - Natural — $1,733.33
item.description:
$1,733.33 · Very Good · Effekt Boutique

Delicious Peavey T-40 with Maple Fretboard and original case. No issues - ready to rock. Worldwide shipping.

item.title: Fender Silent Siren Jazz Bass 2024 - Surf Green — $1,790.85
item.description:
$1,790.85 · Excellent · Fender Fever Ltd.

Weight: 8.7 lbs

Condition is mint, comes in original gig-bag.

SILENT SIREN is indispensable for talking about the Japanese girls band scene. Finally, the base of the signature model is now available on the Made in Japan line. Based on the custom American Standard Jazz Bass, which is the trademark of bassist Ainyan, under the supervision of the person himself, the bright green of the matching head, the stripe of the characteristic pattern, and the pickguard integrated with the control panel are Reproduction. Wide frets on the 9.5-inch radius fingerboard, slim grip neck and HiMass ™ Vintage bridge. The pickup is equipped with a V-mod Jazz bass, and it is finished in a high quality base with Ainyan's selection of specifications not only for looks but also for playability.

item.title: Fender American Standard Jazz 2013 - Sunburst — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Excellent · Tim's Gear Bazaar

Here is a 2013 Fender American Standard Jazz bass in excellent condition! Everything works perfectly and the bass has been professionally setup and it plays like butter!! The frets are in excellent shape as well! It comes with the deluxe fender case in great shape too! If you’re looking for great quality bass and you want to save some cash then here ya go!!! I’ll only ship within the USA! Thanks

item.title: Fender Precision Bass 1973 (with 1979 Charvel Mod Shop Body) — $3,802.97
item.description:
$3,802.97 · Very Good · Wunjo Guitars & Bass

Now here's something you don't see every day, a bass with its own folklore! 

It's apparent that this Precision has had a particularly interesting journey, the Fender neck is from 1973 with that distinctive 70s 'C' profile and a fast taper to the nut compared to its earlier predecessors. The pickups, electronics and hardware are also all original from that year. But at some point the body has been swapped out for a 1979 (super early) Charvel 'Mod Shop' one-piece Ash body (stamp pictured) finished in a gorgeous three tone Sunburst. 

The plot thickens, the bridge cover has been engraved with 'The Ox'.

Whilst there is no provenance to confirm its lineage, we are told it was purchased from an auction of basses that belonged to a famous bass player. Judging by the era of the instrument, the modifications were certainly made by someone who was clearly in the know regarding the rising stars of the California build scene. Coupled with the personal customisation of the bridge cover, all the signs seem to point to a certain rock star and famed purveyor of cool gear - John Entwistle of The Who.  

Shroud of mystery aside, it's a phenomenal bass and in lovely condition for its age. Currently set up with Labella flats it has all the warmth and bass you could hope for to fill out those low end frequencies whilst retaining its articulation. The neck is comfortable, fast playing and has been set up to perfection. 

A great opportunity to get yourself a great vintage bass and a real piece of history, perhaps with more history to be revealed!

It comes with a non-original hard case and our three year set up and servicing warranty included in the price. Will be safely and thoroughly packaged.

item.title: Ibanez acoustic/electric Bass Bass 2012 - Sunburst/Gloss — $475
item.description:
$475 · Excellent · JIM's Gear Emporium

Purchased new played on Sunday church service a few years He was Very Particular with the Bass and then unfortunately passed away.Bass was stored in closet and forgotten till now. Still has the original stickercover on the pick guard.comes with new copper top battery and strap.

item.title: G&L Tribute Fallout Short Scale Bass Surf Green — $799
item.description:
$799 · Brand New · Studio Gears

G&L Tribute Fallout Short Scale Bass in Surf Green

The G&L Tribute Fallout delivers a compact, comfortable playing experience built around its 30" short scale design. Weighing just 8 pounds 6 ounces, this bass balances effortlessly and responds with immediacy, while the slim C neck profile and 9-1/2" radius maple fretboard make fast movement across all 19 frets feel natural and uninhibited. The vibrant Surf Green finish pairs striking visual appeal with functional, forward-thinking bass design.

Playability & Feel

The neck dimensions—1-5/8" width at the nut, 2.11" at the 12th fret, and 0.84" to 0.91" thickness—create a streamlined profile that encourages speed and comfort across extended playing sessions. Hard rock maple construction on both neck and fretboard adds brightness and snap to your attack, while the bolt-on neck joint ensures stable, consistent performance and easy access to higher frets.

Tone & Electronics

G&L's Magnetic Field Design humbucking pickup delivers clarity and output across a wide dynamic range. The 3-position mini-toggle switch unlocks three distinct voicings—parallel for tight punch, split-coil for articulation, and OMG mode for thick, enhanced lows—giving you tonal flexibility without reaching for external gear. The Saddle-Lock bridge couples saddles together for maximum energy transfer and sustain, while G&L tuning machines keep intonation rock-solid through extended sessions.

Key Features
  • 30" short scale length
  • Basswood body construction
  • Hard rock maple neck with maple fretboard
  • CLF/G&L 1-5/8" slim C profile with 9-1/2" radius
  • 19 frets with precise fingerboard radius
  • Single G&L Magnetic Field Design humbucking pickup
  • 3-position mini-toggle switch (parallel/split/OMG modes)
  • Saddle-Lock bridge for enhanced sustain
  • G&L tuners with tapered posts
  • 1.603" nut width
  • 8 pounds 6 ounces weight
  • Factory-fitted D'Addario nickel roundwound short scale strings (.045–.065–.080–.100)

This is a serious short-scale bass that combines distinctive style, responsive playability, and flexible electronics in a lightweight, tour-ready package.

item.title: FENDER Precision Bass PB' Standard 2008 - Sunburst - Japan Import — $967.08
item.description:
$967.08 · Very Good · World's Music - Import France

2008 Fender Standard Precision Bass, Sunburst finish, Made in Japan.


* Hand-picked and imported from Japan by us *


Very good overall condition; shows signs of use, but frets are in excellent shape (8/10—see photos for details). This bass delivers the iconic "Precision Bass" sound: deep lows, punchy mids, and a solid presence in the mix—ideal for rock, pop, funk, or blues.


Specifications:


Serial number: T054353

Weight: 3.730 kg

Manufacturing period: 2007–2009

Neck profile: Oval C

Scale length: Standard 863 mm (34 inches)

Nut width: 42 mm

Pickup: Original Fender Japan Standard PB

Finish: Sunburst

Gig bag included

Serviced by our in-house luthier (cleaning, "standard" setup with 45-100 gauge strings, intonation, truss rod adjustment, electronics check, etc.)

item.title: Fender Japan JB75 MIJ — $699.07
item.description:
$699.07 · Good · Astronauts Guitars

A 70s-style Japanese Jazz Bass with ash body, maple neck/fingerboard, block inlays, and binding.

This bass is priced to move because of the visible mods and heavier cosmetic wear, but the playability is solid and the vibe is very real.


Key Features

– Features CTS pots, a Switchcraft jack, Orange Drop capacitors, and cross-wired wiring.

– The neck has a slight bow in the higher position, but it has been leveled and plays straight on the frets

– The playability is solid, so this is a great choice for the player who likes the specs/mods or doesn’t mind the damage


Specs

– Body: Ash

– Neck: Maple

– Fingerboard: Maple

– Pickup: Replaced with an unknown-brand Alnico magnet pickup

– Assembly: All components replaced: features CTS pots, a Switchcraft jack, Orange Drop capacitors, and cross-wired wiring

– Scale: Long (34”/864mm)

– Frets: 20

– Weight: 4.5kg

– Case: Generic soft case

– Year: Late 2000s


Playability

The neck plays well, and the instrument is currently set up for comfortable action.

Even with the history of repair and wear, it is performing well enough for the player who cares more about playability than cosmetics.


Condition

– Parts replaced: pickup, all assembly parts, frets, nut, strap buttons, control knobs

– Neck back has a refinished area around the skunk stripe; the surface is now smooth with no step

– Binding near the neck end is chipped

– Numerous scratches are present on the fingerboard surface near the neck end

– Other noticeable damage includes dents, scuffs, and paint chips throughout

– Neck is slightly rising at the body joint, but it has been leveled and plays straight on the frets

– Frets: Refretted and leveled; wear is mainly in the higher positions, with the lowest measured point at approx. 0.7mm remaining

– Truss rod: Works properly in both directions


Setup

– 12th fret action: 1st string 1.75mm / 4th string 2.25mm

– No issues for normal play at present


Recommended Player

Best for the working bassist, the mod-friendly player, or the buyer who values tone and function over cosmetic perfection.

If you’d like extra photos or have any questions, please feel free to contact us. If you’re ready to buy, feel free to click “Buy it now”.


Please note

- We are unable to accept price negotiations, as the listed price already reflects our best.

- The shipping fees listed on the item page are reference prices and may differ from the actual shipping cost (including Reverb and PayPal fees.) While the amounts are accurate for many countries, they may vary significantly for others.

- All customs taxes and VAT are the buyers’ responsibility. Please check out the requirements for your country.

- All items are also for sale in our physical workshop in Takadanobaba. There is a chance they might be sold out.

- We sell only at Reverb for customers from outside Japan.

- We accept payment only through Reverb platform.

item.title: Squier "Bitsa" Precision bass - Classic Vibe — $484.01
item.description:
$484.01 · Very Good · Michael's gear outlet

*IMPORTANT - PLEASE READ DESCRIPTION*

For sale - My Squier P bass made of Classic Vibe series parts, a CV 60's P neck and tuners and a CV 70's body, bridge and pickguard. Lovely bass currently strung with LaBella 760fs flats, 45-105 gauge. Also installed is an EMG GZR pickup and wiring. Has a Fender bridge cover, as well as Schaller S-Lock strap buttons.

The strap buttons can be removed and replaced with the originals, which I still have, and I can also remove the EMG pickups and provide the original pickups and wiring if preferred for a discounted rate.

SHIPPING

I am only willing to ship this bass in a disassembled state due to the nature of shipping from Shetland, and no case is included in the price. I will remove the neck from the body and ship them together well packaged, but this will be at the buyer's expense and risk.

item.title: Ibanez ARTB100 2000s - White — $400
item.description:
$400 · Very Good · Tessier-Ashpool

The ARTB100 is a 2000s era shortscale, thumpy passive bass with a pair of humbuckers.

Description from Ibanez:

The classic looks of the Ibanez ARTB100 are enhanced by an arched top and refined body binding. Its clear, pronounced tone and massive low-end come from the ARTB100's metal-covered ceramic pickups.


Neck Material: 3-piece maple/mahogany


Neck Type: ARTB4 set-in


Body: Mahogany body


with maple top and bottom


Frets: Medium frets


Fingerboard: Bound rosewood


Inlay: Pearl dot inlay


Bridge: Gibraltar III Bass bridge


Neck pickup: ARTCORE ACHB-N2 ceramic humbucking/passive


Bridge pickup: ARTCORE ACHB-B2 ceramic humbucking/passive


Hardware: Chrome

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Purple B-Stock 2624 — $989
item.description:
$989 · B-Stock · Studio Gears

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Trans Purple B-Stock 2624

This unplayed C-5 GT five-string delivers a slim, responsive playing experience defined by its thin "C" neck profile and extended 35" scale—design choices that make fast, articulate extended-range work feel natural rather than demanding. The set-neck construction anchors a resonant mahogany body with flamed maple top, yielding both visual presence and focused tonal character across all five strings. B-stock pricing reflects only minor cosmetic marks on an otherwise excellent instrument with full manufacturer warranty.

Playability & Construction

The 3-piece maple neck with carbon fiber reinforcement rods resists flex and provides stable intonation under tension, while the 35" scale paired with 24 X-Jumbo frets and 16" radius ebony fretboard creates a fast, articulate playing surface suited to percussive attack and technical precision. Neck access via heel truss rod adjustment and the Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut (1.771" width) ensure stable tuning and clarity across all five strings, with neck thickness of .787" at the 1st fret and .866" at the 12th fret offering a slim, comfortable grip.

Tone & Electronics

The EMG 40DC bridge and EMG 40P5 neck pickups deliver punchy, articulate bass tones with controlled dynamics, while volume control, blend potentiometer, and 2-band EMG active EQ provide real-time sculpting from aggressive low-end definition to bright, focused mids and highs. The Schecter Custom Bass Bridge with string-thru design and black hardware maximizes sustain and tonal transfer to the body.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with arched flamed maple top, Satin Trans Purple finish
  • Set-neck construction with Ultra Access and black 1-ply binding
  • 3-piece maple neck with carbon fiber reinforcement rods
  • Thin "C" neck shape; .787" thickness at 1st fret, .866" at 12th fret
  • 35" scale (889mm) with 24 X-Jumbo frets and 16" radius ebony fretboard
  • Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut, 1.771" width
  • EMG 40DC bridge pickup and EMG 40P5 neck pickup
  • Volume/Blend controls with 2-band EMG active EQ
  • Schecter Custom Bass Bridge, string-thru design with black hardware
  • Schecter tuners with 2-way heel-access truss rod
  • Offset/Reverse Roman Numeral inlays with side dot markers
  • Includes Ernie Ball 5 String Super Long (.045–.130) strings

This is a premium extended-range instrument engineered for precision and responsive dynamics, offered at significant B-stock discount with cosmetic imperfections that do not affect playability, tone, or structural integrity.

item.title: ESP LTD Phoenix-1004 2010 - Three Tone Sunburst — $1,023.34
item.description:
$1,023.34 · Very Good · BassBros

This bass is stunning with its 34” scale neck-thru-body design, using a five-piece mahogany/walnut neck that has a satin finish on the back for smooth playability, along with mahogany body wings, and a Macassar ebony fingerboard with 21 extra-jumbo stainless steel frets and ESP flag inlays. Other highlights of the Phoenix-1004 include its reverse headstock, LTD vintage tuners, Gotoh 201B-4 bridge, and a set of outstanding EMG 35P4 and EMG 35J pickups. This one is in very good condition with small marks and wear throughout and some scratches to the body. There is a small area of over running paint on the back of headstock but this looks to be from factory. Included is an Epiphone hardcase.

– Part Exchange Welcome –

Serial Number – W10060405
Year - 2010
Colour – Three Tone Sunburst
Body Finish – Satin
Body Wood  – Mahogany
Neck Finish – Satin
Neck Wood – Mahogany/Walnut
Fretboard – Ebony
Frets – 22
Scale Length – 34″
Weight – 10lb 1oz / 4.4kg
Electronics – Passive
Pickups – EMG
Gigbag/Hardcase – Epiphone Hardcase

item.title: Fender American Professional II Precision Bass 2023 - Three Tone Sunburst — $1,894.57
item.description:
$1,894.57 · Excellent · BassBros

This fantastic 2023 Fender American Professional II Precision Bass in classic Three Tone Sunburst with a rosewood fingerboard, has that all important iconic Precision bass tone but with satin neck, uprated hardware, etc. It is in very good condition with only very small signs of use including pick marks throughout to pickguard and small cleaning marks to the finish. We have given the bass a full health check including checking trussrod, electronics, etc. Everything works perfectly as it should. Included is a the original hardcase.

Fretboard - Rosewood

Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Fender
Gigbag/Hardcase - Original Hardcase

item.description:
$435.61 · Excellent · BassBros

This is a fantastic bass, for the money it is quite unbelievable! We are very impressed with how this bass feels and sounds. This would make a solid workhorse bass. It is in excellent condition with a few small marks. We have checked everything over, the trussrod and electronics all work perfectly as they should.

item.title: Dingwall Prima Artist 5-String - Quilted Maple — $16,421.92
item.description:
$16,421.92 · Brand New · Bass Direct

The Prima Artist represents Dingwall’s vision without compromise—a masterwork born from an unwavering pursuit of the finest bass guitar possible. Combining exceptional craftsmanship, innovative engineering, and meticulous attention to detail, it elevates the art of bass building to an entirely new level.

At Bass Direct, we are proud to offer this exceptional Dingwall Prima Artist in stock—an extraordinarily rare opportunity to own one of the most prestigious and meticulously crafted basses ever produced. Hand-built in Canada, this instrument showcases the finest materials, stunning aesthetics, and uncompromising attention to detail throughout.

Featuring a breathtaking Quilted Maple top and back over a Dual Density Flamed Maple and Flamed Walnut core, separated by a striking Purpleheart contrast layer, this Prima Artist is as visually captivating as it is sonically inspiring. The 5-piece Flamed Maple/Wenge/Maple neck is paired with a luxurious Macassar Ebony fingerboard, adorned with elegant White Pearloid inlays and side markers. Finished in a stunning Natural Gloss with a matching headstock and White Pearloid headstock inlay, every element of this bass reflects the highest level of craftsmanship.

Electronically, the Prima Artist is equipped with three custom Prima Artist pickups and the renowned Rupert Neve Designs 2-Band preamp, featuring a master tone control and toggle switches for exceptional tonal flexibility. Combined with Dingwall's legendary fanned-fret design and precision engineering, this bass delivers unparalleled clarity, articulation, and dynamic response across the entire frequency spectrum.

A true collector's piece and professional-grade instrument, this Dingwall Prima Artist embodies the very best of modern bass design and boutique craftsmanship. Opportunities to acquire a Prima Artist of this calibre are exceptionally rare. Available now at Bass Direct.

  • Body: Dual Density flamed maple and flamed walnut core
  • Contrast Layers: 1x Purpleheart
  • Top/Back: Quilted Maple
  • Neck: 5pc Flamed Maple/Wenge/Maple
  • Fretboard: Macassar Ebony
  • Finish: Natural
  • Top Coat: Gloss
  • Headstock Finish: Matching
  • Headstock Inlay: White Pearloid
  • Fretboard Inlay:  White Pearloid Treble-Side 3mm Dots
  • Side Markers: White Pearloid
  • Preamp: Rupert Neve Designs 2-Band w/ Master Tone and Toggles
  • Pickups: 3x Prima Artist
  • Rotary: 3x
  • Tuning: Standard w/ Nickel Strings
  • Misc: Matching cavoty covers and pickup shells, Dunlop strap pins (plus 3rd on back)
  • Accessories: Dingwall Prima Artist Gigbag, Wooden Wrench Kit.
  • MADE IN CANADA
  • Serial Number: 7113

item.title: Vintage Layolo Bass (Made in Italy) - Pearloid Body - Restoration Project — $896.55
item.description:
$896.55 · Non Functioning · WelcomeGuitars.Shop

Up for sale is a rare and striking piece of Italian lutherie history: a vintage Layolo bass. Known for their distinctive style and craftsmanship, this instrument is a true gem for collectors or anyone looking for a unique restoration project.
The bass features the iconic, highly sought-after pearloid celluloid body finish that defines the "Made in Italy" vintage aesthetic.
Condition & Project Details:
This instrument is being sold as a restoration project. It is perfect for a luthier or an enthusiast looking to bring a classic back to life.
Aesthetics: The body features the beautiful original pearloid celluloid covering. The Layolo logo is clearly present on the headstock.
Electronics: The original pickup and electronic components are all present and in working order. They simply require assembly and wiring back into the body.
Pickguard: The original pickguard is missing. However, I am including a technical sheet with the exact original measurements, making it easy for you to have a custom replacement cut and fitted.
Bridge: There is one small piece missing from the bridge assembly. This is a standard component and easily sourceable/replaceable from any vintage guitar parts supplier.


We ship worldwide, consider trade-ins, and offer bargain prices — contact us now!

item.title: FENDER Precision Bass PB'57-Left Hand T 2003 - 2TS Sunburst - Japan Import — $1,551.63
item.description:
$1,551.63 · Very Good · World's Music - Import France

FENDER Precision Bass model PB’57-LH T (2-Tone Sunburst), made in Japan in 2003.

Intended for the Japanese market.


Excellent build quality; playability is perfect. The neck is excellent and very comfortable. Frets are in excellent condition: 9/10. Very good overall condition, with some signs of use (see photos for details).

Sound-wise: offers roundness, precision, power, and strong low-end presence. The maple fretboard adds nice brightness and snap. Features a selected basswood body with good resonance and sustain.

Like many '57 reissue imports, it offers perfect feel and comfort, thanks in part to the quality of its vintage amber finish, which remains very glossy.

Feels great right from the moment you pick it up.


*Hand-picked and imported by us from JAPAN*


Neck: Maple – Oval Type C

Radius: 7.25" (184R)

Scale length: 863 mm (34"), regular

Frets: 20 Vintage-style

Nut width: 42 mm

Pickup: 1 x FENDER Vintage PB

Weight: 4 kg

Serial number: Q065001

Manufacturing period: 2002–2003

Gig bag included

Made in Japan

Serviced by our in-house luthier (cleaning, "standard" 45-100 setup, intonation, truss rod, electronics, etc.)

item.title: Krunk Krynk-75 Bass Guitar USSR Soviet Vintage and Rare — $250
item.description:
$250 · Fair · Vintage Guitars shop

Krunk Krynk-75 Bass Guitar USSR Soviet Vintage and Rare
Made in USSR
                                 
Condition:

  • Bass Guitar is in working condition
  • Watch the condition on the photo

Shipping:

  • WORLDWIDE


Note for the US customers:

The listed price already includes all U.S. import duties and taxes. In 99% of cases, you will not have to pay anything extra. Only in very rare situations, if U.S. Customs decides to recheck or hold the parcel, an additional fee may apply.

We can also offer express delivery to the USA within 7–10 days for an additional cost of $40.

item.title: Schecter Stiletto-4 Stealth Pro 2023 - Present - Satin Black — $1,672.37
item.description:
$1,672.37 · Brand New · Leturiaga

General
Model NameStiletto-4 Stealth Pro
Item Number2270
Guitar Color ShownSatin Black

Neck
TunersTonePros "M Series"
Fretboard MaterialIndian Ebony
Neck MaterialMahogany Neck with Maple Stringers and 2 Carbon Fiber Reinforcement Rods

item.title: 【used】Fender Japan / JB77-195MM NAT 2002-2004 4.465kg #Q029841【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,930
item.description:
$1,930 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Fender is, without a doubt, the number one brand of electric guitars and basses.

It's loved by countless top artists, including Jaco Pastorius, Marcus Miller, and Geddy Lee. (Titles omitted)

The Jazz Bass was released as a higher-end model than the Precision Bass.

Its sharp, clear sound is loved by many bassists and continues to receive overwhelming support even today.

Fender Japan started in the 1980s as a Japanese-made Fender, but is now integrated into Fender itself.

However, the brand's quality is still supported by many artists and it remains highly popular.

This is a Marcus Miller signature model with a distinctive pickguard.

The manufacturing years are 2002-2004.

The body is ash and the fingerboard is maple, specifications reminiscent of the 1970s Jazz Bass.

The pickups are J-BASS VINTAGE (USA), and the preamp is original. The sound is crisp and fast.

The attack is quick, producing a well-defined sound whether slapping or fingerpicking.

This is a must-have for fans and anyone looking for a high-quality 70's style Jazz Bass.

The frets have approximately 80% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

There are scratches and dents on the body and paintwork.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were found.

Controls: Neck pickup volume, bridge pickup volume, treble, bass, active/passive switch
Nut width: 38.9mm
Bridge string spacing: 19.0mm
Scale length: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: 2002-2004
Country of manufacture: JAPAN

During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.

Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Soft case, pickup fence

Text: Mizune Ishikawa

Inspection 담당: Hirayama

Product Photos: Tei

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

●Re-Buyback Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

●Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.

* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We will ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Peavey Peavey Cirrus BXP Active 4-String Bass - Quilt Amber Inc Bag — $504.76
item.description:
$504.76 · Very Good · Cookes Band Instruments

This pre loved Peavey Cirrus BXP Active 4-String Bass with Quilt Top combines striking aesthetics, impressive versatility and professional-level features in a well-crafted instrument. Inspired by the highly regarded USA-made Cirrus series, it delivers excellent playability, powerful tone and dependable performance. Irt is in very good condition with just a few light playing marks. Comes equipped with a rechargable battery and flat wound strings and a gig bag.

Its attractive quilted maple top gives the bass a distinctive, high-end appearance, while the neck-through-body construction enhances resonance, sustain and overall tonal balance. The extended 35-inch scale length helps provide a tight, focused low end with outstanding note definition across the entire fingerboard.

Equipped with a pair of active VFL pickups and an onboard 3-band EQ, the Cirrus BXP offers a wide range of tonal possibilities. Players can easily dial in deep, punchy bass sounds, articulate midrange presence or bright, cutting highs to suit a variety of musical styles.

The smooth fingerboard and comfortable neck profile provide an enjoyable playing experience, while the string-through-body bridge contributes to excellent sustain and tuning stability. Quality hardware and solid construction ensure reliable performance whether playing live, recording or rehearsing.

With its elegant quilted top, active electronics, neck-through design and versatile sound, the Peavey Cirrus BXP Active 4-String Bass remains a popular choice for bassists seeking premium features, modern performance and exceptional value.

item.title: Yamaha SB70 1972 - Antique Brown — $850
item.description:
$850 · Good · Low Rider

Up for sale is a rare, top-of-the-line Yamaha SB-70 from 1972-1973. It features a sleek Les Paul-style single-cutaway body finished in Antique Brown. This is a medium-scale bass built with a 2-piece mahogany body, a 2-piece maple neck, and a rosewood fingerboard sporting arrow inlays and full body/neck binding. Equipped with mini-humbuckers (2 Volume, 1 Tone controls), the craftsmanship on this instrument is outstanding.

Condition:

The body has some scratches, and there is a long scratch on the back of the neck that is purely cosmetic and does not affect playability. There is also a hairline crack near the bottom strap button, but overall, the bass is still in beautiful shape. The truss rod is fully functional, the neck is straight, and it has great, comfortable action. Electronics and pickups work perfectly.

Playability & Sound:

This bass is incredibly easy to play, featuring a very comfortable neck profile and a compact, contoured body that rests perfectly against your arm. It delivers one of the best tones you will ever hear from a shorter-scale bass—the low end is tight and holds the mix beautifully, making it versatile enough for everything from Jazz to Rock. This model was only produced for about a year and is quite rare. If you've been looking for one, don't miss out.

Comes with a gig bag.

item.title: 【used】Black Smoker / STANDARD SERIES BETA J5 3TS 4.430kg #2.20E+21【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $2,589
item.description:
$2,589 · Very Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Black Smoker is a handmade brand launched in 2016 by BLACK CLOUD, a workshop in Azumino City, Nagano Prefecture.

The instruments, crafted by two highly experienced builders, are supported by numerous professional musicians, including Shunsuke Ochi, Futoshi Sakai, and Ren Yamamoto.

This model is the BETA J5, a 5-string passive JB-type bass from the STANDARD SERIES.

The body is made of alder, and the neck and fingerboard are made of roasted maple.

The pickups are original.

GOTOH hardware is used.

The sound is based on the rich midrange characteristic of an alder body, with the clear attack and excellent projection provided by the roasted maple fingerboard.

In addition to the straightforward response typical of a passive JB-type bass, it offers the punch and open playability of a 4-string bass despite being a 5-string.

This is a highly practical instrument that naturally cuts through in an ensemble.

The frets have approximately 80% remaining.
The truss rod is in good condition.
The neck is in good condition.
The body and paintwork show overall minor scratches and dents, and the pickguard has overall scratches that appear to have been caused by picking.
The electronics are in good condition.
No obvious modifications were observed.
Controls: Neck pickup volume, bridge pickup volume, master tone, pickup wiring switch (series/parallel)
Nut width: 48.4mm
Bridge string spacing: 18.0mm
Scale: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: Unknown
Country of manufacture: JAPAN

During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Enjoy these strings, aiming to be a new standard for bassists.

They are delivered after being adjusted by GIB's craftsmen for easy playability.

Accessories: Gig bag, wrench, spec sheet

Text: Mizuki Ishikawa

Inspection 담당: Hirayama

Product photos: Tei

GIB 3-month warranty included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

●Re-buyback Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

●Warranty against defects

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some products such as consigned items, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a specified warranty period from the date of purchase.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.

* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* Failure to present the warranty card, or if it is lost.

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you purchase a new instrument, you will receive a 10% discount on the purchase price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. This discount applies only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the purchase price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.
